indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for stretching without obstructions.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for yoga mats.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light from the large windows can create a calming atmosphere for yoga.

indicators.name: seating furniture
indicators.rationale: The presence of seating furniture, such as couches and chairs, obstructs the open floor space needed for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The open floor space and hardwood flooring support yoga, but the presence of seating furniture obstructs the open area, reducing the suitability to 4 out of 7.
